name: @metorial/pendo
description: Manage product analytics data, in-app guidance, and user feedback. Retrieve, create, and update visitor and account records with custom metadata. Create and manage in-app guides (tooltips, modals, walkthroughs) and segments for targeting users. Query aggregated product usage data including page events, feature events, guide interactions, poll responses, and track events using a flexible aggregation pipeline. Send custom track events from client-side and server-side sources. Manage legacy feedback requests and product roadmap data. Receive real-time webhook notifications for events like guide displays, NPS surveys, poll submissions, visitor creation, and account creation.
